title: Energy crisis not over despite relief rally

Meanwhile, global aviation group IATA says supplies of jet fuel will remain tight.

title: 🔴 Live: Israel continues strikes across Lebanon, Iran denounces a ‘violation' of ceasefire
France: French former prisoners in Iran describe detention conditions
description: Two French nationals who returned home Wednesday after being held for almost four years in Iran said they had never given up hope and would speak out about the "daily horror" of their Iranian prison. After briefly describing their detentions conditions, they shared a message of hope.

title: REPLAY: Hegseth claims Iran suffered 'devastating military defeat'
description: US ⁠Defense ​Secretary ​Pete Hegseth said on ​Wednesday ‌that ⁠the ‌United States ⁠has had a ​decisive military ‌victory over Iran ‌and ​that Tehran's missile program ​has been ​functionally destroyed as he spoke to the media following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire. Watch the press conference in full above.
